Amina and her little brother, Rami, were torn from their home. They hid in the dark as loud sounds filled the night. They lost their parents in the chaos. Amina was scared but promised Rami she would keep him safe. Years passed in a new country. Amina worked hard in school, dreaming of a better life. One day, she received a letter. Their parents were alive! They would come to see them soon. Amina smiled, feeling hope bloom in her heart. She knew they would be together again.
